ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, state) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location (e.g., Midwest, Southeast) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., mRNA, viral vector) */,
  "dosage" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for full vaccination */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the vaccine in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the source data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID where the vaccinations were administered */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Vaccine ID used for vaccination */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "total_boosters" INTEGER /* Total number of booster shots administered */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source ID of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID corresponding to the vaccination data */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Vaccine ID corresponding to the type of vaccine */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of aggregated statistics */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total vaccinations for the day */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated for the day */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people fully vaccinated for the day */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Record ID of the vaccination data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Record ID corresponding to the vaccination data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine batch */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Vaccine ID corresponding to the vaccine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the vaccine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_batches_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID corresponding to the vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
